---
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
---

::: page-header
# OPPORTUNITIES
:::

We are inviting applications for **two fully funded PhD positions** under the Joint PhD Program between **BITS Pilani, India**, and **RMIT University, Australia**. If you are passionate about material science and nanotechnology and want to shape solutions with global impact, we encourage you to apply.

::::::: row
:::: col-md-6
::: opportunity-card
[Project ID: BRJP26100082]{.project-id}

**Intrinsically Chiral Metal Nanoparticles as a New Class of Enantioselective Nanozymes**

<ul class="pi-list">

<li>[BITS PI:]{.pi-label} Prof. Amrita Chakraborty</li>

<li>[RMIT PI:]{.pi-label} Prof. Vipul Bansal</li>

<li>[RMIT Co-PI:]{.pi-label} Prof. Rajesh Ramanathan</li>

</ul>
:::
::::

:::: col-md-6
::: opportunity-card
[Project ID: BRJP26100121]{.project-id}

**Atomically Precise Nanocluster-assembled Plasmonic Nanoparticles: Next generation Catalysts for Energy Conversion**

<ul class="pi-list">

<li>[BITS PI:]{.pi-label} Prof. Amrita Chakraborty</li>

<li>[BITS Co-PI:]{.pi-label} Prof. Sounak Roy</li>

<li>[RMIT PI:]{.pi-label} Prof. Daniel Gomez</li>

<li>[RMIT Co-PI:]{.pi-label} Prof. Ewan Blanch</li>

</ul>
:::
::::
:::::::

## What These Positions Offer

::: panel-tabset
### Program Highlights

-   **Joint PhD Award:** From both BITS Pilani and RMIT University.
-   **Financial Support:** Full tuition scholarships (RMIT), highly subsidized fees (BITS), and a stipend with health cover.
-   **Global Experience:** Start at BITS and spend up to a year in Australia with return airfare included.

### Research & Infrastructure

-   **Supervision:** Co-supervision from faculty at both institutions.
-   **Facilities:** Access to world-class research infrastructure.
-   **Impact:** Aligned with RMIT’s impact-driven platforms across STEM and non-STEM domains.
-   **Structure:** Clear 4-year progression with coursework and milestones.
:::

## Application Details

::: {.callout-warning .deadline-alert appearance="default" icon="true"}

**Last date to Apply: March 28, 2026**

Please ensure all documents are submitted before the cutoff to be considered for these positions.
:::

-   **More information and application link:** [Click here](https://bitspilaniedu.com/rmit/bitsrmitphdwebsite/default.aspx)
-   **Search with respective Project ID and title:** [Click here](https://bitspilaniedu.com/rmit/bitsrmitphdwebsite/ProjectsResearch.aspx)
